items.description:
CODE : ZSC 
Top off your look with the Zerkiouz's Signature Cape, a sleek and stylish cape that’s as unique as your username. Crafted with a timeless design and featuring your very own signature, this cape is the ultimate symbol of confidence and sophistication. Whether you’re exploring the Roblox world or making a statement in-game, the Zerkiouz Signature Cape ensures you stand out with class and style.
